meta.title: Finance Assistant | Premium Management
meta.description: Modern, smart, and secure personal budget management.

hero.title: Manage Future Finance with Crystal Clarity
hero.subtitle: Track your personal budget, credit cards, and goals with a modern, smart, and secure assistant.

items.title: Smart Reminders
items.desc: Never miss a payment. Color-coded (green, yellow, red) smart alarms for upcoming statements and bills.

items.title: Bank-Grade Security
items.desc: With advanced Multi-Tenant architecture, your data is completely isolated. No one can access your financial data.

items.title: One-Click Reporting
items.desc: Convert all your income, expenses, and goals into a razor-sharp Excel file in seconds.

footer.description: The smartest way to manage your personal budget, credit cards, and goals.

cta.title: Step into Financial Freedom
cta.subtitle: Create your free account today and take control of your money.

notificationItems.upcomingPaymentMessage: Your electricity bill is due in 2 days.
notificationItems.criticalBudgetMessage: Your expenses are very close to your income this month.
notificationItems.successReportMessage: Your cash flow report has been prepared.

accounts.title: My Accounts
accounts.subtitle: Manage all your bank, credit card, and cash assets from a single place.

categories.title: Categories
categories.subtitle: Keep your budget under control by grouping your income and expenses.

notFound.title: The page you are looking for might be lost in deep space
notFound.description: The content may have been moved, removed, or the link may be invalid.
